Description: Summon forth your vacuum suit, and live the dream of piloting a futuristic bipedal machina.
Description{Enhanced}: Created for the Cosmic Exploration Initiative, this construction machina was developed as a collaboration between Loporrit, Sharlayan, and Garlean engineers. As a result, it exhibits magitek armor influences in its design, particularly in the area of its piloting system.
Tooltip:
If I am not mistaken, this would
not be the first time you've piloted
one of these suits.
   - G'nibnpha

Description: Summon forth your high mobility vacuum suit, and live the dream of piloting a futuristic bipedal machina.
Description{Enhanced}: Those who have made exceptional contributions to the Cosmic Exploration Initiative are presented with this special vacuum suit, whose chassis and drivetrain have been tuned to increase power output. While proportionately more difficult to maneuver as a result, it is highly regarded among veteran pilots.
Tooltip:
Hop into the pilot's seat!
We'll begin as soon as
you're ready!
   - Wedge
